---
title: "Bring Your Own Data"
---

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" width="780" height="500" src="slides/bring-your-own-data.html"></iframe>
```

[Slides in full screen](slides/bring-your-own-data.qmd){target="_blank"}

# Datasets

Choose one of the datasets below to work with, or bring your own research data.

| Dataset | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| [RNAseq data](../byod/dnaseq.qmd) | Gene expression analysis (volcano plots, heatmaps, PCA) |
| [Ice cover data](../byod/ice_cover.qmd) | Climate data from North American lakes |
| [Paralympics](../byod/olympics.qmd) | Paralympic Games data 1980–2016 |
| [Wine quality](../byod/wine.qmd) | Wine quality from physicochemical properties |

# Example scripts

Worked examples for common analysis techniques:

- [RNAseq volcano, heatmap, PCA](../R/byod/general_tips/volcano_heatmap_rnaseq.R)
- [Read and combine multiple tables](../R/byod/general_tips/read_and_combine_tables.R)
- [Correlation plots](../R/byod/general_tips/correlation_plots.R)
- [PCA](../R/byod/general_tips/penguins_pca.R)
- [k-means clustering](../R/byod/general_tips/kmeans.R)
